features.name: step-ops-decompose
features.description: Split step-ops.ts (1103 lines) by functional domain into 5 focused modules

key_decisions.test_requirements: 45 test cases across 5 files BEFORE decomposition

features.name: cli-command-registry
features.description: Extract CLI commands into registry pattern, each command in own file

features.name: backend-interface-unify
features.description: Unify Backend interface with complete lifecycle methods and capabilities

key_decisions.test_requirements: Parameterized contract tests across all 4 backends

features.name: error-class-hierarchy
features.description: Define AntfarmError hierarchy and migrate all error handling

key_decisions.base_class: AntfarmError with code, context, cause, timestamp + Object.freeze
key_decisions.subclasses: BackendError > ProfileError, StepError > RetryExhausted, ConfigError, CliError
key_decisions.migration_priority: 1) Define hierarchy 2) Migrate step-ops 3) Migrate cli 4) Migrate backends

features.name: type-safety-enhance
features.description: Branded types for IDs, discriminated unions for status, strict generics

key_decisions.branded_types: WorkflowId, StepId, RunId, AgentId, branded BackendType
key_decisions.discriminated_unions: StepResult by status, BackendConfig by type
key_decisions.smart_constructors: workflowId(), stepId(), etc. as only way to create branded values

features.name: immutable-data-models
features.description: Apply readonly to Step, Story, WorkflowSpec, BackendConfig

key_decisions.enforcement_level: readonly on all type fields + ReadonlyArray + Readonly<Record>
key_decisions.mutable_variant: Mutable<T> type for internal DB construction only

features.name: test-unit-coverage
features.description: Add unit tests for core modules, target >=80% coverage

key_decisions.target: installer 85%, backend 80%, cli 75% — ~241 new test cases
key_decisions.execution_order: F-001 tests > F-004 tests > F-003 tests > F-002 tests > gap fill
key_decisions.co_location: New unit tests next to source (src/**/*.test.ts)

recommended_execution_order: Phase 1: F-004 (error hierarchy) + F-008 (test patterns) — foundation
Phase 2: F-001 (step-ops decompose) + F-003 (backend unify) — parallel
